summary: Circle Stamp Text Orientation Fix - All Tests PASSED. The fix for mirrored/reflected text in circular stamps has been verified. Both 'TLS VERIFIED' at the top and 'SCAN TO VERIFY' at the bottom now read correctly left-to-right.

backend_api_tests: Circle stamp with reduced 150x150px size - PASS
Multiple stamp shapes (rectangle, circle, oval) - PASS
Text orientation algorithm in code - PASS
frontend_tests: Stamp preview shows circle with correct text orientation - PASS
Form fields (document name, recipient) work - PASS
Generate Verified Stamp button available - PASS
visual_verification: Circle stamp preview shows 'TLS VERIFIED' at TOP reading left-to-right - PASS
Circle stamp preview shows 'SCAN TO VERIFY' at BOTTOM reading left-to-right - PASS
Text is NOT mirrored or reversed - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: The fix in draw_curved_text_top() and draw_curved_text_bottom() functions correctly handles text orientation
Text at top arc: starts from left side, progresses right (angle decreases)
Text at bottom arc: starts from left side, progresses right (angle increases)
Character rotation follows the arc tangent for natural reading
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test advocate account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Circle stamp text orientation fix verified. The draw_curved_text_top and draw_curved_text_bottom functions in /app/backend/server.py (lines 590-638) correctly render text reading left-to-right on circular stamps. All stamp shapes (rectangle, circle, oval) working correctly.

circle_stamp_text_orientation.top_text: '★ TLS VERIFIED ★' - reads left-to-right along top arc
circle_stamp_text_orientation.bottom_text: 'SCAN TO VERIFY' - reads left-to-right along bottom arc
circle_stamp_text_orientation.fix_applied: Corrected angle calculations in draw_curved_text_top and draw_curved_text_bottom functions

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/circle_test_01_uploaded.png - PDF uploaded with circle stamp preview
.screenshots/circle_final_02.png - Circle stamp with correct text orientation visible

draw_curved_text_top.fix: Start angle from left side of top arc (pi/2 + total_angle/2), decrement for each character

draw_curved_text_bottom.fix: Start angle from left side of bottom arc (-pi/2 - total_angle/2), increment for each character
